caption: A man with a buzzed haircut and a dark beard is recorded in a studio setting against a black, ribbed acoustic foam wall. He wears over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt that features a small black logo on the left chest containing the text "Authentic". He is positioned in front of a silver condenser microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Throughout the sequence, the man speaks into the microphone, his facial expressions shifting from a wide-mouthed smile to a more closed, focused look. He remains stationary, with only his mouth and facial muscles moving as he talks. The lighting is consistent, and the camera angle remains fixed in a medium close-up shot, capturing him from the chest up.
